title: tephroseris papposa var. neglecta
intro: Tephroseris papposa var. neglecta, also known as the Alpine Saw-wort, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of Europe. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and roots which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Tephroseris papposa var. neglecta include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea or used in a tincture form to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
